title: Glade Air Freshener, Aerosol Room Spray, Clean Linen, Pack of 12 (12 x 300ml)
features: Bring back memories of fresh line-dried laundry
Linen scent is given a modern twist with added notes of watery melon, crisp air and sparkling citrus
Instantly infuse the air with passionately crafted fragrance to express your spirit
Air freshener for home designed to fight tough odours
Use on a daily basis or as a final touch after your cleaning routine; the fresh linen scent will delight you
description: Product Description Bring back memories of fresh line-dried laundry with Glade Clean Linen room freshener spray. Its been given a modern twist with notes of watery melon, crisp air and sparkling citrus that delight your senses. Designed to fight tough odours and leave behind a fresh fragrance, Glade air fresheners can be used on a daily basis or as the final touch after your cleaning routine. The fresh linen scent will delight you, instantly infusing the air with passionately crafted fragrances. Directions Shake can well. To freshen the air, point can towards the centre of the room and spray. This product is not recommended for use on fabrics. Directions Shake can well.
